name: Brick Breaker Premium 3
short_description: The arcade classic returns with the trilogy finale. Blast through 50 new levels to wipe out The Evil Snarfers for good. Use classic power-ups and the new Multi-Shot Laser Paddle to save Earth—and unlock the final ending cutscenes.
detailed_description:
The Trilogy Finale Is Here!

An arcade classic returns with the final Brick Breaker in the trilogy.

You are Blippy—the heroic paddle standing between Earth and The Evil Snarfers.

Fight through 50 brand-new, challenging levels as the story reaches its final chapters. Your mission is clear: rid the planet of the Snarfers once and for all, save Earth, and earn your happily-ever-after with Princess Paddle.

Master classic power-ups, unleash the new Multi-Shot Laser Paddle, and push to the finish to unlock the final ending cutscenes for this trilogy.

Features

  • 50 brand-new challenging levels to complete

  • Play as Blippy, the heroic paddle

  • Final chapters of the trilogy’s heroic storyline

  • Mission to save Earth and marry Princess Paddle

  • Classic power-ups to power through tougher stages

  • New Multi-Shot Laser Paddle for extra firepower

  • Unlock the final ending cutscenes by completing the game

  • Gamepad Support
